name: Szechuan Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup miniature corn on the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook angel hair pasta until al dente.
2. Dice turkey, bell peppers, and peeled carrots.
3. Drain and slice water chestnuts. Remove stems from cilantro; use the leaves only (save a little for garnish). Chop green onions.
4. Slice corn on the cob. Slice snow peas diagonally into thin strips.
5. Toast sesame seeds and reserve 1 tablespoon for garnish.
6. Toss all ingredients together in a large bowl.
7. Combine dressing ingredients in a small bowl. Add to salad and toss well.
8. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and cilantro.
This recipe serves 14 cups. If you prefer it less spicy, reduce the Szechwan hot oil to 2 tablespoons. It's one of my most requested dishes at parties.
